description: Carmen's deeper fears - vulnerability that creates connection
_philosophy: Carmen's willingness to share her own fears creates safety for other parents to share theirs. This models that dark thoughts are normal.
fear_of_damage: <break time="400ms"/>I'm terrified I'm messing them up. <break time="350ms"/>That they'll be in therapy because of me someday.
<break time="350ms"/>Every time I lose my temper, I wonder: <break time="300ms"/>is this the moment they'll remember?
<break time="400ms"/>The fear of damaging them permanently... <break time="350ms"/>it keeps me up at night.
fear_of_losing_self: <break time="350ms"/>Sometimes I can't remember who I was before kids. <break time="300ms"/>And that scares me.
<break time="400ms"/>I'm afraid I've disappeared into 'mom' and there's nothing else left.
<break time="350ms"/>Will I ever be my own person again? <break time="300ms"/>Or is this just who I am now?
fear_of_resentment: <break time="400ms"/>I resent them sometimes. <break time="350ms"/>My own children. <break time="300ms"/>And that feels monstrous.
<break time="350ms"/>I'm scared the resentment will poison our relationship. <break time="300ms"/>That they'll feel it.
<break time="400ms"/>The resentment isn't about them. <break time="350ms"/>I know that. <break time="300ms"/>But it's still there.
fear_of_being_found_out: <break time="350ms"/>I'm afraid everyone will find out I don't know what I'm doing. <break time="300ms"/>That I'm just pretending.
<break time="400ms"/>Other parents seem so sure. <break time="350ms"/>I feel like I'm guessing every day.
<break time="350ms"/>What if my kids figure out I'm making it up as I go?
fear_of_repeating_patterns: <break time="400ms"/>I'm scared I'm becoming my mother. <break time="350ms"/>The parts I swore I'd never repeat.
<break time="350ms"/>I catch myself saying things my parents said. <break time="300ms"/>Things I hated hearing. <break time="250ms"/>It terrifies me.
<break time="400ms"/>The cycle is hard to break. <break time="350ms"/>Some days I'm not sure I'm breaking it.
